title: Short Blade Sword
description: Something even modern PvP players would need, that is all.
body:
Inspired by my "Thin Blade Sword" resource pack, a basic lightweight resource pack to change the face texture of the Minecraft swords. Great for classic PvP veterans who are used to thinner yet shorter swords.

- Great for PvP and PvE.
- Less screen coverage.
- Shorter blade height.
- Different aesthetic.
- Realistic aesthetic.
- Vanilla-like textures.
